article.title: UBER | SDE II | India
article.content:
Education: M.Tech in CSE 
Years of Experience: 3.5
Prior Experience: SDE-2 at FAANG
Prev Comp: 58 LPA
Date of the Offer: Feb 2025
Company: Uber
Title/Level: SDE II
Location: India
Salary: 49 LPA
Stock bonus: $50,000 for 4 years
Bonus: 7 LPA Fixed (Can vary to 14 LPA based on performance)
Total comp (Salary + Bonus + Stock): 49 + 7 + ~11 = 67 LPA 
Benefits: Uber ride benefits + welness reimbursement
Other details: Offer accepted.

post.content: Congrats on the offer.Can you please share the interview experience.
why switching for so less hike?
Not worth the switch as hike is not significant post tax and also getting same designation
Does base include PF and gratuity as well?
